notes.rmse_mae_note: RMSE/MAE are mainly meaningful for rating prediction models such as MF and UserCF.
notes.full_eval_note: Full-ranking evaluates recommendations from the whole catalog and is strict.
notes.sampled_random_note: Random sampled-ranking is useful but can make popularity baselines look strong when negatives are too easy.
notes.sampled_popaware_note: Popularity-aware sampled-ranking samples negatives from similar popularity buckets and better tests personalized ranking.
